Photographer The eye behind the lens

About

Three years on a resort floor taught me exactly who I am and what I bring to the table.

I read a guest in seconds. I know the right approach before they finish their sentence. I lead teams. I train photographers with zero experience into ones who can shoot a wedding alone. Mexican photographer, working across Saint Lucia, Jamaica, and Grenada. Spanish, English, French.

Weddings

Shot solo, start to finish. Ceremonies, first dances, everything in between.

Sessions

Maternity, couples, families. Directed until they forget the camera.

Lifestyle

The property when nobody poses. The work doesn't stop when the session ends, and that eye doesn't turn off.

Guests between plans, caught in the last of the afternoon.

Get in touch

Based in Saint Lucia through October 2026. Open to relocation.
